results.title: About Our Company & Mission
results.content: Our mission is to translate critical scientific advancements in aging research into accessible health products and technologies.

results.title: Our Team
results.content: ### All Products. From the Lab to Your Door Promote optimal aging with Basis, support... [Go to All Products collection page. Shop All Products](/collections/all). # Meet the Elysium team. ### The Elysium team is made up of individuals who are passionate about creating a fundamentally new approach to healthcare, one that focuses not exclusively on disease but on health. We believe that aging is not only the greatest risk factor for all major chronic conditions, but that aging research represents the most significant opportunity to improve human health today. It is our responsibility to share the benefits of aging research with as many people as possible, to effect real and meaningful change. ## Leadership Team. * ### [Eric Marcotulli](/blogs/leadership-team/eric-marcotulli). * ### [Dan Alminana](/blogs/leadership-team/dan-alminana). * ### [Leonard Guarente, PhD](/blogs/leadership-team/leonard-guarente-phd). * ### [Mark Morris](/blogs/leadership-team/mark-morris). [Log in](https://auth.elysiumhealth.com/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=UsPPT7nPkUv1IM3t2NBI3YMgWZr9TVGx&return_to=/account&auto_login=false?redirect=https://www.elysiumhealth.com)[Cart](/cart). # Eric Marcotulli. Eric Marcotulli, Elysium Health co-founder and chief executive officer, graduated from Harvard Business School and joined Sequoia Capital as an investment partner. While in Silicon Valley, Marcotulli realized that despite the significant, positive impact of new technologies on our understanding of health and disease, there remained a lack of innovation in the consumer-facing portion of the healthcare market. With a keen interest in aging research and its potential to have a profound impact on the most important areas of health, he created a company focused on developing compelling compounds found in nature that support long-term health. * Choosing a selection results in a full page refresh. * Opens in a new window.

results.title: Basis – NAD+ Supplement for Cellular Aging
results.content: Target aging at the source—your cells. Increase your NAD+ levels with Basis for healthy aging, to boost cellular energy, and maintain healthy DNA.

results.title: Basis – NAD+ Supplement for Cellular Aging
results.content: Increase your NAD+ levels with Basis for healthy aging, to boost cellular energy, and maintain healthy DNA. The potent combination of NR and pterostilbene in Basis is designed to increase NAD+ levels and counter the decrease in the activity of sirtuins, which occurs with normal aging. Developed by Dr. Leonard Guarente, a leader in the field of aging research, Basis was clinically proven to increase NAD+ levels by an average of 40% in a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled clinical trial published in the peer-reviewed journal [*Nature Partner Journals: Aging and Mechanisms of Disease*](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41514-017-0016-9). ([Instead, you can read our **scientific paper**.](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41514-017-0016-9)) Your cellular NAD+ levels are now 40% higher than they were on day one, and that’s where they’ll stay if you keep taking Basis. NAD+, or nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide, is a critical coenzyme found in every cell in your body, and it’s involved in hundreds of metabolic processes — but NAD+ levels decline with age. Elysium conducted a first-in-humans study demonstrating clearly that Basis can increase and sustain cellular NAD+ levels.
